title: Totya of Undying
description: Replaces the totem of undying with a Тотя ❤️ totem
body:
Replaces the Totem of Undying with a custom texture and sound of the Тотя meme.
Changes the "Postmortal" advancement name and description.

Also adds a hiden texture when the totem is renamed.

---------------------------------------------------------------------

Reemplaza el Totem de la Inmortalidad con una textura y sonido customizado del meme Тотя.
Cambia el nombre y descripción del logro "Post mórtem"

También añade una textura oculta al renombrar el totem.

---------------------------------------------------------------------
### Important: Only works with US English by now. We are working on the other languages.
